case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. JASON GILLENWATER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED OCT-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILLENWATER, JASON
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM JAN-24-2019 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILLENWATER, JASON $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.00, CCSF HAS CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT IT RENDERED SERVICES THAT ARE UNPAID. THE COURT RAISED THE ISSUE OF WHETHER CCSF IS IMPERMISSIBLY ATTEMPTING TO BALANCE-BILL DEFENDANT. THE COURT CANNOT ASCERTAIN ON THIS RECORD WHETHER KNOX-KEENE APPLIES , BUT FINDS THAT IS AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE FOR WHICH DEFENDANT BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
PROSPECT LIMITATIONS ON ZSFG'S RIGHT TO RECOVER BALANCE OF BILLS CCSF V. JASON GILLENWATER (ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-24-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROSA RAMIREZ, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JASON GILLENWATER IS PRESENT. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN REQUESTS FURTHER DOCUMENTATION FROM THE CITY REGARDING SF GENERAL BILLING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JASON GILLENWATER ONLY. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE WITH A PROOF OF SERVICE MAILED BY 3/11/2019 IN EXHIBIT ENVELOP. JUDGE:CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GILLENWATER, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: ADVANCE OF COURT DATE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE. DEFENDANT JASON GILLENWATER DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN REQUESTS THE PLAINTIFF, THE TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE, SHALL FILE A STATEMENT ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 19, 2019, CONCERNING WHY IT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER THE BALANCE OF ITS BILL FROM THE DEFENDANT NOTWITHSTANDING THE PROSPECT MEDICAL GROUP HOLDING AND THE CONCERNS THE COURT HAS RAISED HERE. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE STATEMENTS BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL ON THE DEFENDANTS IN EACH CASE. PLAINTIFF SHALL INCLUDE A PROOF OF SERVICE IN ITS FILING. DEFENDANT JASON GILLENWATER MAY BUT IS NOT REQUIRED TO FILE RESPONDING STATEMENTS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 11, 2019. DEFENDANT MUST SERVE ANY STATEMENTS ON PLAINTIFF BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL; THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER OR REVIEW ANY STATEMENTS NOT SERVED ON THE OTHER PARTY, AND DEFENDANTS MUST FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE OTHER PARTY HAS SEEN THE STATEMENT. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE REQUIRING A FURTHER HEARING. THE MATTERS WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED ON MARCH 11, 2019. NO COURT APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED ON MAR-11-2019.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GILLENWATER, JASON
